items.name: Ash
items.description: A master of stealth and assassination. Ash dispatches enemies with lethal blades and poison.

items.name: Atlas
items.description: An immovable force, Atlas turns the earth itself into his weapon.

items.name: Banshee
items.description: A sonic warrior who twists sound itself into a devastating weapon.

items.name: Caliban
items.description: A Warframe with the combined essence of Sentient and Warframe, Caliban uses aberrant energy to overcome his foes.

items.name: Chroma
items.description: An apex predator, Chroma can alter his damage output and become an unstoppable force.

items.name: Ember
items.description: A fire-centric Warframe. Ember engulfs enemies in flame, leaving nothing but ash.

items.name: Equinox
items.description: A Warframe with a split personality – able to shift between day and night aspects.

items.name: Excalibur
items.description: The quintessential Warframe – all-round fighter, ideal for those new to the Origin System.

items.name: Excalibur Prime
items.description: The pinnacle of the Excalibur line, forged with prime components for superior performance.

items.name: Frost
items.description: Frost is a powerful Warframe capable of slowing down and freezing enemies solid.

items.name: Gara
items.description: With the power of sunlight and glass, Gara shatters her enemies with deadly constructs.

items.name: Garuda
items.description: Garuda is a Warframe that thrives on the blood of her enemies.

items.name: Gauss
items.description: Pure speed and kinetic force. Gauss is most effective in constant motion.

items.name: Grendel
items.description: A glutton who devours enemies whole and uses their energy against them.

items.name: Gyre
items.description: A coil-powered Warframe that harnesses electricity to stun and destroy.

items.name: Harrow
items.description: An inquisitor Warframe who sacrifices his own shields to empower allies and himself.

items.name: Hildryn
items.description: Hildryn uses her shield as a weapon and fuel, making her near-invincible.

items.name: Hydroid
items.description: Master of the sea. Hydroid crashes upon his enemies like a wave.

items.name: Inaros
items.description: Ancient desert warrior. Inaros commands the desert sands to defeat enemies.

items.name: Ivara
items.description: A master archer and thief, Ivara excels at stealth and precision.

items.name: Khora
items.description: Khora and her kavat companion Venari ensnare enemies in a web of violence.

items.name: Lavos
items.description: A master alchemist, Lavos injects toxic compounds to dominate the battlefield.

items.name: Loki
items.description: A trickster Warframe specialising in deception and misdirection.

items.name: Mag
items.description: Mag wields magnetic forces, reshaping the battlefield with crushing pulls and repelling bursts.

items.name: Mesa
items.description: Mesa is a gunslinger Warframe, able to wield her pistols with extraordinary speed.

items.name: Mirage
items.description: A jester of darkness. Mirage uses illusions and explosions to confuse and destroy.

items.name: Nekros
items.description: A master of life and death. Nekros raises fallen enemies as loyal servants.

items.name: Nezha
items.description: A nimble warrior who blazes through combat with speed and divine fire.

items.name: Nidus
items.description: An organism born of the Infestation. Nidus grows stronger as he infects more foes.

items.name: Nova
items.description: A quantum Warframe that manipulates matter and antimatter to destroy enemies.

items.name: Oberon
items.description: Part warden, part avenger. Oberon taps into nature's fury to protect allies.

items.name: Octavia
items.description: A maestro of battle who empowers her allies through the power of music.

items.name: Protea
items.description: A specialist in gadgets and temporal manipulation, Protea never stops fighting.

items.name: Revenant
items.description: A Warframe made from a Eidolon. Revenant uses Sentient energy to dominate foes.

items.name: Rhino
items.description: An unstoppable force, Rhino charges headlong into combat to crush everything in his path.

items.name: Saryn
items.description: A lethal Warframe who spreads viral decay across the battlefield.

items.name: Sevagoth
items.description: A manifestation of death. Sevagoth gathers the souls of the fallen to empower himself.

items.name: Trinity
items.description: An angelic Warframe, Trinity provides essential heals and energy restores to her team.

items.name: Valkyr
items.description: A feral Warframe who goes berserk in combat, clawing through enemies at alarming speeds.

items.name: Vauban
items.description: An engineer Warframe who deploys inventive gadgets and turrets in combat.

items.name: Volt
items.description: Volt is a starter Warframe who unleashes devastating electrical attacks.

items.name: Wisp
items.description: A phantasmal Warframe who floats above the ground and empowers allies with spectral wisps.

items.name: Wukong
items.description: An immortal Warframe drawing power from ancient myths. Wukong never truly dies.

items.name: Xaku
items.description: A Warframe made from the shattered remains of three Warframes. Xaku steals enemy weapons.

items.name: Yareli
items.description: A water-wielding Warframe who rides a K-Drive and drowns enemies in whirlpools.

items.name: Zephyr
items.description: A master of the air. Zephyr floats above the battlefield raining down destruction.
